name: Paul Stuart
message: Paul Stuart has lasted the test of time being one of the only remaining haberdashers on Madison Avenue. We credit our continued success to the desire to stay true to our roots while innovating with the times. Renowned for expert craftsmanship, thoughtful design using materials and fabrics sourced from the finest mills around the world, Paul Stuart combines Savile Row, Old Hollywood and classic New York to create timeless American classics with contemporary sophistication.
